title: 学他你冒险周
summary: 本周重点复习 学、他、你。故事会围绕 学习、学生、他们 展开。

story.title: 早晨出发
story.image_prompt: Create a storybook illustration, soft shapes, warm light, expressive characters scene for children. Scene: 我学习中文。. Include focus characters 学, 他, 你 and words 学习, 学生.
story.video_prompt: Create a 8-second short clip, gentle camera move, kid-safe, colorful classroom adventure clip. Scene: 我学习中文。. Keep the motion simple, cheerful, and easy for children to follow.
story.video_script: 早晨出发：先展示 我学习中文。，再慢慢突出汉字 学、他、你，最后用一句温柔的鼓励收尾。

story.title: 课堂发现
story.image_prompt: Create a storybook illustration, soft shapes, warm light, expressive characters scene for children. Scene: 他很好。. Include focus characters 他, 你 and words 学生, 他们.
story.video_prompt: Create a 8-second short clip, gentle camera move, kid-safe, colorful classroom adventure clip. Scene: 他很好。. Keep the motion simple, cheerful, and easy for children to follow.
story.video_script: 课堂发现：先展示 他很好。，再慢慢突出汉字 他、你，最后用一句温柔的鼓励收尾。

story.title: 开心收尾
story.image_prompt: Create a storybook illustration, soft shapes, warm light, expressive characters scene for children. Scene: 你好！. Include focus characters 你 and words 他们, 他是.
story.video_prompt: Create a 8-second short clip, gentle camera move, kid-safe, colorful classroom adventure clip. Scene: 你好！. Keep the motion simple, cheerful, and easy for children to follow.
story.video_script: 开心收尾：先展示 你好！，再慢慢突出汉字 你，最后用一句温柔的鼓励收尾。
